name: TRUPANION, INC.
summary: PART I Our Mission Our mission is to help loving, responsible pet parents budget and care for their pets. Company Overview We provide medical insurance for cats and dogs in the United States, Canada, and certain countries in Continental Europe. Through our data-driven, vertically-integrated approach, we develop and offer high-value medical insurance products, priced to take into account each pets unique characteristics and coverage level.
